title: Creed Car Air Freshener for Men | Aventos Perfume Inspired Car Fragrances | Strong Freshener with Odour Eliminator Technology | Creed Automotive Air Freshener | GREED Scent by Perfa
features: SUPER STRONG SCENT THROW - Engulf your car with the luxurious fragrance of Greed. This car air freshener smells like a strong perfume.

SMELL LIKE YOUR FAVOURITE PERFUME - Fed-up of the boring scents of cherries and strawberries? Our luxury car air fresheners for men smells like a perfume and aftershave rather than a car air freshener.
ODOUR ELIMINATOR TECHNOLOGY - Car scents which completely eliminate odours, taking you back to that new car smell and replacing it with a car perfume - carfume air freshener

MADE WITH REAL ESSENTIAL OILS - Made with a blend of fragrance and essential oils, this aromatherapy air freshener is a vital car accessory for those lengthy journeys to keep you concentrated for longer periods of driving.

LONG LASTING FRAGRANCE - A car perfume like no other. Lasting up to 3 months before needing to be refilled. Specially formulated to project a strong perfume scent over long periods of time. A true car air freshener diffuser.
ADJUST THE STRENGTH TO SUIT YOU - Personalise your car smell air freshener to suit your taste. Simply move the wooden stopper up and down the diffuser chords to set the strength to your liking.
GIFT-READY PACKAGING - No need to repackage, our stylish, high-end car perfume diffuser comes sealed in a luxury gifting box. Perfect for birthday gifts or any other type of car gift.
REFILL AND REUSE - A full range of refills can be found on our shopping page. Fancy a change? Try our Suvage style car freshner or any other car scent from our range to spice things up.

PROUDLY MANUFACTURED IN THE UK - The entire car fragrance range by Perfa is made here in the UK to ensure we adhere to the highest of British Standards. Beyond a standard set of car fresheners, experience a true sense of British luxury.
OUR PROMISE - No matter the circumstances, if you aren't entirely satisfied with your product, we'll buy them back! That's our promise, to you :)
